product_overview: HandyServe is a service booking frontend that lets customers discover providers, create and track bookings, confirm arrival, and complete payments. It also supports provider and admin authentication through JWT-based login and registration flows.
core_goals: Enable secure user registration and login for customer, provider, and admin roles
Allow customers to discover service providers by category and location
Support end-to-end booking creation and status tracking
Provide customer arrival confirmation before payment is requested
Enable payment initiation, verification, and promo-code validation for completed services

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can register and log in as customer, provider, or admin, then retrieve their authenticated profile using JWT-based access.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid customer/provider details -> Receive 200 with token and user -> GET /api/auth/me with JWT token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile
POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with token and user -> GET /api/auth/me with JWT token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/auth/register with missing or invalid required fields -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Customers can create bookings for providers, view their bookings, and progress a booking through its multi-stage lifecycle.
user_flows: POST /api/bookings with authenticated customer booking details -> Receive 200 with BookingDto -> GET /api/bookings with JWT token -> Receive 200 with user's booking list -> PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Accepted with provider authorization -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto

POST /api/bookings with authenticated customer booking details -> Receive 200 with BookingDto -> PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=On_the_Way with provider authorization -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto -> PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Reached with provider authorization -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Completed before required prior statuses are met -> Receive 400 Invalid transition
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Cancelled with authenticated user -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto if cancellation is allowed, otherwise Receive 400 Invalid transition

features.name: Customer Arrival Confirmation
features.description: After a provider marks a booking as Reached, the customer can confirm arrival before payment can proceed.
user_flows: PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Reached with provider authorization -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto -> PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Reached_Confirmed with authenticated customer -> Receive 200 with updated BookingDto
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Reached_Confirmed before provider sets status to Reached -> Receive 400 Invalid transition
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status?status=Reached_Confirmed with missing or expired JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Customers can initiate and verify payment for a booking after service completion milestones, and can validate promo codes for discounts.
user_flows: POST /api/payments/initiate with authenticated customer and bookingId -> Receive 200 with orderId, amount, currency, and invoiceId -> POST /api/payments/verify with bookingId, paymentId, and signature -> Receive 200 with verified true and status Completed
GET /api/payments/promo/{code} with authenticated user -> Receive 200 with PromoCodeDto for a valid promo code
POST /api/payments/initiate with invalid bookingId or unauthorized user -> Receive 400 Error
GET /api/payments/promo/{code} with invalid code -> Receive 404 Invalid code

features.name: Provider Discovery
features.description: Customers can browse all service providers or search nearby providers using location-based filters.
user_flows: GET /api/providers without authentication -> Receive 200 with Provider list -> GET /api/providers/nearby?lat=number&lon=number&radius=number without authentication -> Receive 200 with nearby Provider list
GET /api/providers?category=cleaning&location=cityname without authentication -> Receive 200 with filtered Provider list
GET /api/providers/nearby?lat=invalid&lon=invalid&radius=number -> Receive 400 or empty/invalid response depending on backend validation
GET /api/providers/nearby with missing coordinates -> Receive error response from backend validation

tech_stack: Java Spring Boot (backend API on port 8081)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and registration for customer, provider, and admin roles with JWT tokens

endpoints.description: Login with email and password, returns JWT token and user
Register a new user (customer or provider) with optional profile photo

features.name: Booking Management
features.description: Create, view, and update booking status through multi-stage flow (Requested → Accepted → On_the_Way → Destination → Reached → Reached_Confirmed → Pending_Payment → Completed)

endpoints.description: Create a new booking for a service provider
Get all bookings for the current user
Update booking status (provider or customer triggered transitions)

query.status: string (e.g. Accepted, On_the_Way, Destination, Reached, Reached_Confirmed, Pending_Payment, Completed, Cancelled)

features.name: Customer Arrival Confirmation
features.description: After provider marks Reached, customer must confirm arrival on TrackingPage before provider can request payment

endpoints.description: Customer calls this with status=Reached_Confirmed to confirm provider arrival

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Customer pays for completed services via UPI, Card, or Wallet after provider requests payment

endpoints.description: Initiate a payment for a booking
Verify and complete the payment, marks booking as Completed
Validate a promo code for discount

features.name: Provider Discovery
features.description: Customers search and browse service providers by category, location, and availability

endpoints.description: Get list of all available service providers with optional filters
Get nearby providers based on coordinates

known_limitations.issue: Status transition from Reached to Reached_Confirmed requires backend to be restarted in Eclipse after code updates
known_limitations.impact: Customer confirm arrival button fails if backend has cached old class files

known_limitations.issue: Profile photo upload uses base64 encoding which may cause large payload sizes
known_limitations.impact: Slow registration if photo is not compressed below 200x200
